message:
feat(demo-showcase): integrate AdvancedTextEditor and MousePlayground screens

Expand the showcase to 20 screens with two new additions:

AdvancedTextEditor (bd-12o8):
- Full integration in ScreenId enum with proper routing
- Refactor search algorithm from grapheme to char-based indexing
- Apply rustfmt formatting and style API updates

MousePlayground (bd-bksf):
- Add to ScreenId::ALL array with proper tab label "Mouse"
- Wire up update(), tick(), view() and keybindings() dispatch

Chrome enhancements (bd-3vbf.7):
- Enhanced help overlay using Help widget for professional modal
- Double border visual emphasis and two-column layout
- Section headers for Global vs screen-specific bindings

visual_effects.rs:
- Migrate from .style(Style::new().bold()) to .bold() builder pattern
- Use .base_color() instead of .style().fg() for cleaner API

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
